examples.title: Perceptron Algorithm
examples.description: Basic perceptron algorithm for binary classification
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Perceptron
INPUT: features X, target y, learning rate η
OUTPUT: weights w

BEGIN
 w ← initialize weights randomly
 FOR EACH epoch
 FOR EACH sample (x, y) in X, y
 prediction ← dot product(x, w)
 IF prediction * y < 0 THEN
 w ← w + η * y * x
 RETURN w
END
examples.explanation: The perceptron algorithm iteratively updates the weights based on the prediction error.

examples.title: Python Perceptron Implementation
examples.explanation: This Python implementation defines a Perceptron class with fit and predict methods.
